inst✝¹ : Group G
K : ℝ

A : Finset G

S : Finset G := {g ∈ A⁻¹ * A | ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op g • A ∩ A).card}

hFA : F ⊆ A
hFcard : ↑F.card ≤ 2 * K
hASF : A ⊆ S * F
⊢ ∃ a ∈ A, ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card

    rcases hA₀ with ⟨a₀, ha₀⟩

    -- Show that ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(A ∩ (A • S ^ 2)).card
    have h1 : A ⊆ A ∩ (A • S ^ 2) := by

    have h2 : ↑A.card ≤ ↑(A ∩ (A • S ^ 2)).card := by
      apply card_le_card

      apply (div_le_iff₀ (by positivity)).mpr
      exact_mod_cast h2
    simpa using h3
